instruction: Please write something up for the shop crew that covers how we receive a customer vehicle, log any loose personal items, and route the keys and paperwork before teardown. Save it in /Shop/Operations and title it "Vehicle Intake and Pre-Teardown Steps".

rule_ref.rule_text: When starting a repeatable shop process document, he prefers a template rather than a freeform memo or report.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: If it’s something I’ll reuse in the shop, I want it built as a template.

attributes.title: Front Counter Vehicle Intake Memo
attributes.content_brief: One-page guidance for service writers on collecting keys, mileage, and customer concerns at drop-off.

attributes.title: Tagging Customer Belongings
attributes.content_brief: Quick notes on labeling loose items found in incoming vehicles and placing them in the secure bin.

attributes.title: Teardown Handoff Issues Summary
attributes.content_brief: Summary of recent paperwork and key-routing misses between intake and teardown over the last month.

attributes.title: Parts Hold Area Labeling Memo
attributes.content_brief: Short reminder on marking bins for customer-approved, backordered, and damaged parts.

attributes.title: Arrival Photo Capture Sheet
attributes.content_brief: Reusable layout for recording required vehicle photo angles, condition notes, and signature fields at drop-off.
